since_last: 81% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.80%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 81% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.78% · BTC +1.74% · Gold +1.57% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 81% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.80%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.80%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.73%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +10.79%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +10.79%, HPE +9.99%, SYNA +7.56%, MU +6.96%, LSCC +6.29%. Laggards: AVAV -4.72%, PLTR -2.84%, IBM -2.45%, CRM -2.40%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +3.10% at $152.89
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +3.10% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
